query: What demand charges apply to commercial customers with demand >500 kW in California, within PG&E's territory, based on the OpenEI tariffs data? Answer should contain service class name and demand charge for at least 2 classes
final_answer:
Based on the OpenEI IURDB tariffs data for Pacific Gas & Electric Co (PG&E) in California, here are the demand charges for commercial customers with demand >500 kW:

## **E-19 Medium General Demand TOU (Secondary Voltage)**
- **Eligibility**: Commercial customers with demand between 500-999 kW at secondary voltage
- **Demand Charges**:
  - **Flat demand charge**: $42.10/kW (applied during summer months: May-October)
  - **Time-of-Use demand charges**:
    - Off-peak tiers: $0/kW
    - Mid-peak tier: $16.44/kW
    - On-peak tier: $21.59/kW
- **Fixed charge**: $57.12/day
- **Source**: [OpenEI IURDB - E-19 Secondary](https://apps.openei.org/IURDB/rate/view/69de7e4cd600f18ec30600ac)

## **E-19 Medium General Demand TOU (Primary Voltage)**
- **Eligibility**: Commercial customers with demand between 500-999 kW at primary voltage
- **Demand Charges**:
  - **Flat demand charge**: $33.10/kW (applied during summer months: May-October)
  - **Time-of-Use demand charges**:
    - Off-peak tiers: $0/kW
    - Mid-peak tier: $14.86/kW
    - On-peak tier: $18.71/kW
- **Fixed charge**: $84.72/day
- **Source**: [OpenEI IURDB - E-19 Primary](https://apps.openei.org/IURDB/rate/view/69de7c756d1ebb0263094f0d)

## **E-19 Medium General Demand TOU (Transmission Voltage)**
- **Eligibility**: Commercial customers with demand between 500-999 kW at transmission voltage
- **Demand Charges**:
  - **Flat demand charge**: $16.47/kW (applied year-round)
  - **Time-of-Use demand charges**: $0/kW (no additional TOU demand charges)
- **Fixed charge**: $110.17/day
- **Source**: [OpenEI IURDB - E-19 Transmission](https://apps.openei.org/IURDB/rate/view/69de7d02edea9919e60bad8e)

**Key Observations**:
- Customers at higher voltage levels (primary and transmission) receive lower demand charges
- Secondary voltage customers face the highest demand charges but lower fixed daily charges
- All E-19 schedules include Peak Day Pricing (PDP) events with 9-15 events per year
- Option R variants are available for customers with qualifying storage or renewable generation systems
